name: Tattoo Curse
description:
Originally male in this story.

Origin: Recently you lost a bet with a friend Eric (whatever the bet was and how it was lost is up to you), the winner could make the other get a tattoo of whatever there choosing. So when the day came to get that tattoo he had you wear a blind fold so that way it could be a surprise. After a few hours you were aloud to take off the blind fold and looking at your stomach you find a symbol that is commonly associated with a succubus.
creator: Bush615
